trans-unit.source: Intermediate GIS Operations
trans-unit.target: Intermediate GIS Operations

trans-unit.source: This chapter introduces more intermediate GIS operations that you will most likely use in your work with QGIS.
trans-unit.target: This chapter introduces more intermediate GIS operations that you will most likely use in your work with QGIS.

trans-unit.source: The first chapter covers spatial operations that manipulate data according to their spatial characteristics and distribution, such as __clipping__, __buffering__, __dissolving__, __spatial joins__, or __selecting by location__.
trans-unit.target: The first chapter covers spatial operations that manipulate data according to their spatial characteristics and distribution, such as __clipping__, __buffering__, __dissolving__, __spatial joins__, or __selecting by location__.

trans-unit.source: For example, you can select the hospitals within a certain distance of an area, or delete all the roads that are not within a part of the city.
trans-unit.target: For example, you can select the hospitals within a certain distance of an area, or delete all the roads that are not within a part of the city.

trans-unit.source: The second chapter introduces operations that manipulate the non-spatial information, such as __table functions__, __non-spatial joins__ or __non-spatial queries__.
trans-unit.target: The second chapter introduces operations that manipulate the non-spatial information, such as __table functions__, __non-spatial joins__ or __non-spatial queries__.

trans-unit.source: __Chapter__
trans-unit.target: __Chapter__

trans-unit.source: __Competences & Objectives__
trans-unit.target: __Competences & Objectives__

trans-unit.source: __[Chapter 1: Spatial Data Processing](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_spatial_tools.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Chapter 1: Spatial Data Processing](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_spatial_tools.md)__

trans-unit.source: __At the end of this chapter, you should:__
trans-unit.target: __At the end of this chapter, you should:__

trans-unit.source: know the spatial relationships,
trans-unit.target: know the spatial relationships,

trans-unit.source: understand the concept of spatial joins,
trans-unit.target: understand the concept of spatial joins,

trans-unit.source: understand the geometrical operators used in QGIS.
trans-unit.target: understand the geometrical operators used in QGIS.

trans-unit.source: __[Chapter 2: Overlay Operations (Clip, Dissolve, Buffer)](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_overlay_operations.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Chapter 2: Overlay Operations (Clip, Dissolve, Buffer)](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_overlay_operations.md)__

trans-unit.source: __At the end of this chapter, you should:__
trans-unit.target: __At the end of this chapter, you should:__

trans-unit.source: understand overlay operations in QGIS,
trans-unit.target: understand overlay operations in QGIS,

trans-unit.source: know how to perform clipping, buffering, and dissolving operations,
trans-unit.target: know how to perform clipping, buffering, and dissolving operations,

trans-unit.source: understand more advanced clipping operations.
trans-unit.target: understand more advanced clipping operations.

trans-unit.source: __[Chapter 3: Centroids](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_centroids.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Chapter 3: Centroids](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_centroids.md)__

trans-unit.source: __At the end of this chapter, you should:__
trans-unit.target: __At the end of this chapter, you should:__

trans-unit.source: know how to use centroids in QGIS.
trans-unit.target: know how to use centroids in QGIS.

trans-unit.source: __[Chapter 4: Non-Spatial processing](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_non_spatial_tools.md)__
trans-unit.target: __[Chapter 4: Non-Spatial processing](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_non_spatial_tools.md)__

trans-unit.source: __At the end of this chapter, you should:__
trans-unit.target: __At the end of this chapter, you should:__

trans-unit.source: know how to use table functions,
trans-unit.target: know how to use table functions,

trans-unit.source: know how o perform non-spatial data queries,
trans-unit.target: know how o perform non-spatial data queries,

trans-unit.source: know how to perform non-spatial joins.
trans-unit.target: know how to perform non-spatial joins.

trans-unit.target: __[Exercises for Module 5](/content/Module_5/en_qgis_module_5_exercises.md)__
